message:
fix: add fsync to spm_config and health storage saves

Ensure data durability by adding fsync before rename in:
- internal/config/spm_config.go Save()
- internal/health/storage.go Save()

This follows the same pattern used elsewhere in the codebase
for safe atomic writes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
